sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91459" key="pukteuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυκτ-ευτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91459.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boxer</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
